name: deslop
description: Detect and remove AI-generated linguistic slop from code, comments, documentation, READMEs, changelogs, commit messages, and any text artifacts. Use whenever the user mentions "AI slop", "deslop", "remove AI-isms", "sounds like AI", "too AI", "clean up AI writing", "make it sound human", or asks to review text for AI patterns. Also trigger when reviewing any AI-generated documentation, comments, or prose -- even if the user doesn't explicitly mention AI slop -- if the content exhibits hallmark AI writing patterns like filler adjectives, hedge phrases, or obvious code comments. Trigger for any request to "clean up", "tighten", or "edit" AI-generated text, and when auditing codebases for comment quality.
